\tzpentry{ID4330}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4330 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ \frac{3\mu_0\mu_1\mu_2}{2\pi d^4} \to \infty \text{ as } d \to 0$
\]
